items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主要驱动因素：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四大监控指标：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX指数（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金价格更易回撤；VIX指数上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX指数抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、黄金价格偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX指数回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、黄金价格喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：U.S. stock futures under pressure as oil gyrates amid ongoing Iran confl…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Mortgage and refinance rates today, March 18, 2026: Lower by a little…

items.title_en: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
items.summary_en: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.

items.title: 日本希望通胀，但伊朗战争可能实现这一愿望，但这不是东京所期望的类型。
items.summary: 伊朗战争推动日本的“成本推动”通胀，而不是央行BOJ所追求的“需求拉动”通胀。
items.title_en: Japan wanted inflation and Iran war could grant that wish. But it's not the type Tokyo desires
items.summary_en: The Iran war is pushing up "cost-push" inflation in Japan as opposed to the "demand-pull" inflation the BOJ seeks.

items.title_en: The Iran war is sending shockwaves through the world's busiest IPO market
items.summary_en: Market volatility and geopolitical tensions have choked liquidity in India’s IPO market, forcing high‑profile companies to hit pause.

items.title_en: Iran war-induced fertilizer shortage threatens Republicans in farm states ahead of midterms
items.summary_en: Democrats are vying for competitive seats across farm country in 2026, and fertilizer shortages spurred by the Iran war give them a new affordability angle.

items.summary_en: A breakout of oil prices in Asia has left analysts debating whether U.S. crude could see further upside.

items.title: 内塔尼亚胡称伊朗正在被“摧毁”，但革命需要“地面部件”。

items.title_en: Netanyahu says Iran is being 'decimated' but revolution requires 'ground component'
items.summary_en: Netanyahu's comments came after President Donald Trump, speaking in the Oval Office, said earlier that he would not send U.S. troops to the Middle East.

items.title: 伊朗战争威胁到人们所忽视的资源——氦的供应。对市场意味着什么
items.summary: 供应配额正在根据谁需要气体最多来确定。半导体制造商位于“优先顺序”顶端，氦顾问Phil Kornbluth表示。
items.title_en: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
items.summary_en: Supply allocations are being set by who needs the gas the most. Semiconductors are at the "top of the pecking order," said helium consultant Phil Kornbluth.

items.title: 赫格塞斯说，伊朗战争可能的2000亿美元开支请求可能会改变：“要杀坏人，就需要钱”

items.summary_en: President Donald Trump's National Economic Council director, Kevin Hassett, said Sunday that the war has already cost $12 billion.
